narrative:
Richfield Twp township has 2,379 registered voters, with 53.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.5% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.6%, a clear Republican lean of 10.9 percentage points.
